chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 6301 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on MIT-II report dated 21.01.2026 22.01.2026 Mr. Makhdoom Tahir, Advocate along with the petitioners. Mr. Ali Safdar Deeper, Addl. A.G. Sindh. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, APG along with Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II, CPO, IO/SIP Bashir Hussain Abro and SIP Muhammad Tariq of PS Korangi Industrial Area, Karachi East. ------------------------------------ 1. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that petitioner No.1 being sui juris, without any coercion or force had contracted marriage with the petitioner No.2 and now she is performing her marital obligations and living with petitioner No.2 with her consent. Learned counsel further submits that relatives more particularly respondent No.5, the brother of the petitioner No.1, being antagonized upon marriage of the petitioner, is causing threats to both the petitioners hence they have approached this Court for necessary protection of life, honour and property. 2. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, learned APG, submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioners without any discrimination. They after going through the record, ensures that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. I.O present in Court has produced copy of the statement of petitioner No.1 and undertakes to submit report in terms of Section 173 Cr.PC. upon the basis of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded by him. 3.

They after going through the record, ensures that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. I.O present in Court has produced copy of the statement of petitioner No.1 and undertakes to submit report in terms of Section 173 Cr.PC. upon the basis of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded by him. 3. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the above statement sought disposal of instant petition with directions to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. 4. In view of whatever discussed above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents more particularly respondent No. 5 to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. I.O present in Court is directed to submit report in view of the statement of petitioner No.1 before the concerned Magistrate. Office is directed to facsimile the copy of this order to respondents for compliance. Learned MIT-II to ensure compliance. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
